tasks.instruction: Extract the language learning functionality research from the PRD and save it as a separate markdown file for future reference (Version 2). Document all findings related to AI-driven language learning, interactive grammar and pronunciation tutoring functionality, market analysis, and implementation recommendations. Save this file at '/data/chats/4mwmi/workspace/docs/language_learning_v2_research.md'.

Implement comprehensive unit tests for the Genesis platform MVP and prepare a testing strategy document for end-to-end tests with fixtures and mock data for version 2. Include test coverage for all core components: file upload, text extraction, voice synthesis, interactive quizzes, annotation capabilities, and AI-powered conversation. Save the unit tests at '/data/chats/4mwmi/workspace/src/tests/' and the testing strategy document at '/data/chats/4mwmi/workspace/docs/testing_strategy.md'.
